channel.title: Dimension 20 Live
channel.description: Latest releases from Dimension 20 Live on Dropout.tv

item.title: Gauntlet at the Garden (Live From Madison Square Garden)
item.description:
The Intrepid Heroes return to the Unsleeping City with this one-shot live from Madison Square Garden.

Duration: 2:20:08

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, The Unsleeping City, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, new york city, fantasy, supernatural, adventures, magic, wizards, heroes, superpowers, LGBTQ+, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan

item.title: The Roll of a Lifetime: How Dimension 20 Sold Out Madison Square Garden
item.description:
The cast and crew of Dimension 20 reflect on their journey from The Dome to Madison Square Garden.

Duration: 30:31

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, The Unsleeping City, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, new york city, fantasy, supernatural, adventures, magic, wizards, heroes, superpowers, LGBTQ+, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan, michael schaubach, carlos luna, rick perry, ebony hardin, behind the scenes

item.title: Dimension 20 Live: Gauntlet at the Garden Teaser
item.description:
The Intrepid Heroes take over Madison Square Garden for a night of thrills, chills, and tomfoolery. New special premieres May 13th.

Duration: 00:51

Tags: Dimension 20 Live, The Unsleeping City, dungeons and dragons, tabletop rpg, new york city, fantasy, supernatural, adventures, magic, wizards, heroes, superpowers, LGBTQ+, emily axford, ally beardsley, brian murphy, zac oyama, siobhan thompson, lou wilson, brennan lee mulligan
